arts.ttl: Newcastle United and Aston Villa face similar PSR roadblock that has hampered Champions League ambition
arts.sum: One of the big talking points in English football this season is about the profit and sustainability (PSR) rules that have hit a number of Premier League clubs. The quartet began talking about PSR hurting the ambitions of new English clubs, Newcastle United and Aston Villa, in the past couple of seasons.

arts.ttl: Ornstein drops major Liverpool update on intense Salah, Van Dijk & Trent contract talks
arts.sum: David Ornstein has provided an update on the ongoing Liverpool contract situation, with an offer made to Virgil van Dijk, but seemingly not much progress yet on Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold. One of the most reliable transfer journalists in the industry, Ornstein has today written in the Athletic about Liverpool’s continued efforts to tie […] The post Ornstein drops major Liverpool update on intense Salah, Van Dijk & Trent contract talks appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'fall short' with opening contract offer to Virgil van Dijk

arts.ttl: Gullit on Liverpool star: “He can become the most important man for the Dutch national team”
arts.sum: Writing in his column for De Telegraaf, legend Ruud Gullit spoke highly of Liverpool's Ryan Gravenberch, while also praising Van Dijk and Gakpo.

arts.ttl: Liverpool make Van Dijk and Alexander-Arnold offers amid ‘UNCLEAR’ future
arts.sum: Liverpool have taken steps towards securing the future of Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold, David Ornstein has reported, with an offer for Mohamed Salah expected to follow soon. Liverpool are in the unsettling position of losing three of their biggest stars as free agents in the summer, with the trio of Van Dijk, Alexander-Arnold and Salah all out of contract at the end of June 2025.
